title: Proclamation No. 1376, s. 2007
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 1376

DECLARING THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 27, 2007 AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALVAR, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS

WHEREAS, Thursday, September 27, 2007, marks the birth anniversary of General Miguel Malvar, the last general of the Philippines Revolution to surrender to the Americans;

WHEREAS, it is but fitting and proper that the people of the Municipality of Malvar, Province of Batangas be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, EDUARDO R. ERMITA, Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, do hereby declare Thursday, September 27, 2006 as special (non-working) day in the Municipality of Malvar, Province of Batangas.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 5 th day of September, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Seven.

By authority of the President:

Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary:

Senior Deputy Executive Secretary
